2604.21598.title: DryRUN: On the Role of Public Tests in LLM-Driven Code Generation
2604.21598.paper_summary: Multi-agent frameworks are widely used in autonomous code generation and have applications in complex algorithmic problem-solving. Recent work has addressed the challenge of generating functionally correct code by incorporating simulation-driven planning and debugging, where language models trace execution steps to verify logic. However, these approaches depend on human-provided public test cases to ground the debugging and simulation loop. Manually authoring comprehensive input-output examples is a labor-intensive bottleneck in the software development lifecycle. Because ground-truth input-output examples are rarely available prior to implementation in real-world software engineering, this dependency restricts methods to curated competitive programming benchmarks. Furthermore, we identify that reliance on these public tests induces an ``overconfidence gap,'' causing frameworks to overfit to simplistic examples and fail on hidden evaluations. In contrast, we observe that external sample inputs are not strictly necessary for code generation. We demonstrate that large language models can autonomously generate valid inputs and simulate execution traces to self-correct. Consequently, we develop DryRUN, a framework that eliminates the need for ground-truth samples by allowing the LLM to iteratively plan, autonomously generate its own inputs and simulate execution, mitigating algorithmic overconfidence. Evaluations on the LiveCodeBench v6 dataset (post-March 2025) demonstrate that DryRUN matches performance against CodeSIM, a state-of-the-art and public-test-dependent framework, while operating entirely without public test cases or external execution feedback while reducing output token consumption.
2604.21598.paper_summary_zh: 多代理框架在自主代碼生成中被廣泛使用，並且在複雜的算法問題解決中有應用。最近的研究解決了通過結合模擬驅動的規劃和調試來生成功能正確代碼的挑戰，其中語言模型追蹤執行步驟以驗證邏輯。然而，這些方法依賴於人類提供的公共測試案例來支持調試和模擬循環。手動編寫全面的輸入-輸出示例是軟件開發生命周期中的一個勞動密集型瓶頸。由於在現實世界的軟件工程實施之前，真實的輸入-輸出示例很少可用，這一依賴限制了方法僅限於策劃的競賽編程基準。此外，我們發現依賴這些公共測試會產生“過度自信差距”，使框架過度擬合簡單示例並在隱藏評估中失敗。相比之下，我們觀察到外部樣本輸入對於代碼生成並不是嚴格必要的。我們證明大型語言模型可以自主生成有效的輸入並模擬執行痕跡以自我修正。因此，我們開發了DryRUN，一個通過允許LLM迭代規劃、自主生成自己的輸入和模擬執行來消除對真實樣本需求的框架，從而減少算法過度自信。在LiveCodeBench v6數據集（2025年3月以後）的評估中，DryRUN的性能與依賴公共測試的最先進框架CodeSIM相匹配，同時完全不依賴公共測試案例或外部執行反饋，並減少輸出標記消耗。
2604.21598.author: Kaushitha Silva et.al.
